title: Horse Charge Damage
description: Deal speed based damage to mobs in minecraft like real life cavalry using horses.
body:
This mod adds horse charge damage based on speed of horse works on both server and singleplayer.


Features that are configurable are
1- Damage and speed adjustments
2-target filtering for horses and hostile mobs
3- option so same team entities don't take damage
4-charge cooldown
5-shield disable on certain damage threshhold(experimental)

- Added pike support from Epic Knights.
- Now the "recruits" when equiped with pikes brace (crouch) in front of a horse charge and deal massive damage to horse with their pikes.
- Recruits cant use shields while using pikes for balance so they could be countered by Bowmen.
- Added lance support for horsemen to use EK's lance like a player.
- Many new config values to customize totally as you like.
- 

Config can be found in your game files like normal under the name- "horsechargedamage-common.toml".

If you have any queries, suggestions or bugs to report dm me at discord "amigokilo88"
Enjoy :)
